global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body and a pointed tail. It features a brownish-olive back, a bright yellow underbelly, and a distinctive chestnut cap on its head. The wings and tail are darker with subtle streaks, and the legs are thin and dark.

part_details.head: Small with a chestnut cap and a thin, pointed beak.
part_details.underbelly: Bright yellow, contrasting with the darker back.
part_details.wings: Darker with subtle streaks, blending with the back.
part_details.tail: Pointed and slightly darker than the body.

spatial_relations: The chestnut cap covers the top of the head.
The yellow underbelly extends from the chest to the tail.
The wings are positioned laterally along the sides of the body.
The pointed tail extends from the rear of the body.
